---
title: "CodeBook"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## \# Code Book

\## Data source

The data come from the Human Activity Recognition Using Smartphones Dataset.

\## Variables

\- subject: identifier of the subject

\- activity: activity performed by the subject

\- remaining variables: averaged measurements of mean and standard deviation signals from the original dataset

\## Transformations performed

1\. Merged the training and test sets

2\. Extracted only variables containing mean() or std()

3\. Replaced activity IDs with descriptive activity names

4\. Renamed variables to be more descriptive

5\. Created a second tidy data set with the average of each variable for each activity and each subject
